review_log.notes: Checklist-derived P0 issue doc covered findings, intent, residual risks, and stop rules.
Plan covers all four P0 findings, explicit verification, install portability via uv+bcrypt, and real-container validation.
Seed helper implemented with unit coverage for fresh generation, JWT construction, idempotency, and partial-state refusal.
Installer integration and compose pin landed with shell smoke coverage for fresh install and rerun behavior.
Fresh-container validation reached Home Assistant RUNNING on 2026.3.4 and authenticated with the generated token.
Validation report recorded 4/4 PASS with green tests, pinned image evidence, and fresh-container auth checks.
